title: TransactionEvent
description: Represents a financial transaction event (payment, transfer, withdrawal, refund, etc.) submitted for risk and fraud evaluation.

transactionId.description: Caller-assigned unique identifier for this transaction. Used for idempotency and correlation.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction being evaluated.

amount.description: Transaction amount in the major currency unit (e.g. 150.00 for USD 150).

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP).

originatorEntityId.description: Identifier of the entity initiating the transaction (sender, payer).

beneficiaryEntityId.description: Identifier of the entity receiving value (recipient, payee). Optional for withdrawals.

channel.description: The channel through which the transaction was initiated.

ipAddress.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the client initiating the transaction.

deviceFingerprint.description: Hashed device fingerprint associated with the client session.

geolocation.description: Geographic location of the transaction initiation point.

merchantDetails.description: Present when the counterparty is a merchant.

paymentMethod.description: Details about the payment instrument used.

maskedIdentifier.description: Masked or tokenized identifier (last 4 digits, IBAN suffix, etc.).

binCountry.description: Issuing country of the card BIN (if applicable).

tokenized.description: Whether the identifier is a network token rather than a raw PAN.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for tenant-specific enrichment signals.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the transaction occurred.
